title: Correlate release evidence with workflow runs
outOfScope: Release provider API changes outside the repository workflow.

sources.reason: Work Item Contract and repository governance rules.
Release workflow source of Run ID and source identity.
Existing release identity and artifact integrity tests.

riskAssessment.reason: Release evidence must fail closed when workflow identity or artifact digests are missing or inconsistent.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the implementation plan and release workflow changes are within scope.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm every published evidence record names one workflow run, source SHA, release tag, and matching artifact digests.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Release evidence contains a correlation record with a non-empty workflow Run ID, Run SHA, source commit, and release tag, and rejects missing or mismatched identity.
Correlation artifact digests are generated from the same release evidence and mismatches fail closed in published distribution validation.
Workflow and distribution tests cover missing Run ID, Run SHA mismatch, tag mismatch, and artifact digest mismatch; documentation describes the contract.
guidelines: Release identity is fail-closed: missing, stale, or contradictory workflow evidence must not pass.
Generated release evidence is produced by the release workflow and is validated before tag or publication mutations.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Run SHA or release tag mismatch

intent.problem: Release evidence currently records source and tag identity but does not make the originating workflow run and artifact digest relationship a single validated correlation record.
constraints: Preserve the existing exact-SHA release flow and public asset contract.
Do not publish or tag before correlation validation passes.
intent.rationale: A deterministic correlation record makes release evidence auditable and prevents mixing evidence from different runs, commits, tags, or generated artifacts.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the full implementation loop, including CI and workflow changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
